content: React Context performance pitfalls for games: (1) Context re-renders entire consumer tree on any value change - catastrophic for game loops at 60fps. (2) Provider value object created every render forces all consumers to re-render even with React.memo. (3) useReducer in Context does not solve re-render cascade. (4) For rapid updates use useRef instead of useState - no re-renders. (5) Split contexts by update frequency: touch positions in ref, game phase in Context. (6) Project CLAUDE.md already mandates React Context over Redux - this makes the Context split pattern critical. (7) Zustand/Jotai with selectors avoid Context re-render problem entirely but are out of scope per PROJECT.md. (8) useMemo for expensive derived state. (9) useTransition for non-critical UI updates.
